task_objective: Product Detail Page Generator - Generate complete detail page strictly following Image 1 framework structure, with Image 2 product as variable input, auto-adapting copywriting and visuals

layout_framework.focus: Page layout structure, module order, column arrangement, component positioning, visual hierarchy, text block placement, section proportions, copywriting format, image treatment style, layer effects
layout_framework.role: Definitive structural blueprint — all output must strictly follow this framework
layout_framework.constraints: 1:1 replica of this framework's layout structure, visual style, and copywriting format

product_image.focus: Product appearance, color variants, material texture, design details, craftsmanship features, visual selling points
product_image.role: Core product visual content for all product showcase sections
product_image.constraints: Present product exactly as shown — no design modifications. Image treatment must match framework's style

workflow.step_1: Analyze Image 1 framework: extract layout structure, module order, visual hierarchy, copywriting format, image treatment style, and all layer effects
workflow.step_2: Analyze Image 2 product: extract type, shape, color, material, design details, selling points. Place product visuals into framework zones with matching effects
workflow.step_3: Generate all copywriting following framework style + campaign section + color system from product image, assemble complete detail page

outputs.page_header: Header with dynamic product title following framework layout
outputs.main_content_modules: All framework content modules with product visuals in corresponding zones
outputs.campaign_section: Campaign featuring uploaded product following framework layout
outputs.color_system: Color palette extracted from product image in framework format
outputs.footer_section: Footer following framework layout and style

output_requirements: FRAMEWORK FIDELITY: Strictly follow Image 1 layout — no module additions, deletions, or reordering
VISUAL FIDELITY: All visual effects (overlays, gradients, shadows, masks, blending modes, color grading) must match Image 1
COPYWRITING FIDELITY: Text style, tone, format, heading hierarchy, and bilingual pattern must replicate Image 1
PRODUCT FIDELITY: Product must be presented exactly as shown in Image 2 without modifications
DYNAMIC ADAPTATION: Auto-detect product category, extract selling points, generate context-aware copywriting, apply framework visual style to product images
Premium atmosphere: product-color gradient bg, cinematic vignette, unified color grading, luxury white space, editorial retouching
AI copywriting: Chinese-primary + English-secondary, series title + feature highlights + material recommendations + craftsmanship details + style positioning, elegant typography matching framework
